description_long: This is a classic outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from several horizontal wooden slats, each fastened with large, round metal bolts. The armrests and legs are constructed from ornate, black wrought iron, with decorative scrollwork and circular motifs providing both structural support and visual appeal. The wood is stained a rich brown, contrasting with the dark metal elements. The bench is wide enough to comfortably seat two to three people and is designed for durability in public spaces such as parks or sidewalks. The armrests are flat and squared, offering a stable place to rest arms or small items. The overall design combines traditional craftsmanship with robust materials suitable for frequent use in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, brown wooden slat bench with ornate black wrought iron legs and armrests, designed for outdoor public spaces. The bench features a supportive backrest and decorative scrollwork on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the horizontal wooden slats, and both armrests with visible metal bolts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved backrest, the scrollwork of the iron armrest and legs, and the thickness of the wooden slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the supporting iron frame, with less detail on the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the scrollwork and the profile of the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_design: ornate black wrought iron scrollwork legs
